pi_items.source: Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Most_Dangerous_Game), American Literature database, and multiple academic sources confirm the exact story title

pi_items.verified_value: Richard Connell (full name: Richard Edward Connell Jr.)
pi_items.source: Wikipedia biography, IMDB, and author database confirm author name as Richard Connell (1893-1949)
SparkNotes, eNotes, Shmoop, and LitCharts character analyses confirm protagonist is named Sanger Rainsford
Wikipedia summary and character analysis sources confirm antagonist is General Zaroff. Story also published as 'The Hounds of Zaroff'
Freytag's Pyramid definition verified through multiple literary sources (Writers.com, MasterClass, The Write Practice) confirming the first stage is Exposition
Freytag's Pyramid definition verified through multiple literary sources confirming the second stage is Rising Action
Freytag's Pyramid definition verified through multiple literary sources confirming the third stage is Climax
Freytag's Pyramid definition verified through multiple literary sources (Writers.com, Studio Binder, The Write Practice) confirming the fourth stage is Falling Action
Freytag's Pyramid definition verified through multiple literary sources confirming the fifth stage is Resolution/Dénouement
Task description explicitly states 4 pages are required (Title, Diagram, Events, Discussion)
Task description states Freytag's Pyramid diagram with five labeled stages (each stage should be represented by a shape), and export_result.sh script counts shapes in the flipchart
ActivInspire educational software uses .flipchart file extension. Export script and setup script confirm this is the correct format. File is a ZIP archive containing XML content
Wikipedia confirms 'The Most Dangerous Game' was first published in Collier's magazine on January 19, 1924, and won the O. Henry Award
Wikipedia confirms the story is also published and known as 'The Hounds of Zaroff'

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart about 'The Most Dangerous Game,' a real short story by Richard Connell published January 19, 1924. The story features protagonist Sanger Rainsford being hunted for sport by antagonist General Zaroff on an island. The flipchart must include Freytag's Pyramid plot diagram with five stages (Exposition, Rising Action, Climax, Falling Action, Resolution), specific character names (Rainsford and Zaroff), and a discussion section. The file is saved as a .flipchart file (ZIP archive format) with minimum 5 shapes representing the pyramid structure.
